positive: A majestic celestial forest scene, highly stylized and minimalist, featuring giant glowing bioluminescent flora and ancient, curved tree trunks in deep indigo and teal tones. The main subject is a symmetrical group of stylized celestial animals—such as elegant phoenixes and gentle mountain lions—perching amongst the glowing roots. The composition must be highly graphic and centered, emphasizing strong, deep silhouettes against a vibrant, ethereal gradient background of cosmic lavender and neon violet. Use intricate line work and woodcut engraving techniques mixed with neon vaporwave aesthetics. The mood is mystical and enchanting. Suitable for direct screen printing on dark fabric. High contrast, perfect symmetry, clean lines, digital painting, trending on ArtStation, photorealistic matte finish.
